blended.narrative: Pine Knob is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 63°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
